text.title: backup-database-postgres Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule id from content/01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the cluster fully managed PaaS (RDS/Cloud SQL/AlloyDB) with native backups enabled AND no cross-cloud copy required?

conclusion.verdict: use the PaaS native backup engine; do not run a parallel pipeline

branch.question: Will pg_stat_archiver.failed_count be monitored and alerted on?

conclusion.verdict: STOP — wire monitoring before enabling WAL archiving; an unmonitored PITR chain is worse than no PITR
enable pg_basebackup or pgBackRest stanza + archive_command + Prometheus alert

text.example: managed_with_native_backup=false → pitr_required=true → wal_monitoring_planned=true → conclusion=wal-archive-monitoring (enable pgBackRest + Prometheus alert).
